description: Detects code injection in JavaScript/TypeScript: eval(), new Function(), setTimeout/setInterval with string argument, vm.runInContext. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes with an identifier function (cannot filter to only eval/setTimeout/setInterval without #match? predicate support, and cannot check if first arg is non-literal). All direct calls and new_expression with Function constructor flagged.

flag.message: Direct function call detected -- verify this is not eval(), setTimeout(), or setInterval() with a dynamic string argument
